opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I stood up and the room spun, my fingers are completely numb, and I have no energy to even lift my arms. I read that this vitamin problem can damage your spinal cord.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly this evening and I'm terrified it's a stroke or my nerves failing.

symptom_narrative.character: dizziness on standing, tingling in both hands, weak all over, breathing fast
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on after standing, worse when I panic
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting/lying, slowing my breathing a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tingling in BOTH hands and around the mouth, no slurred speech, no facial droop, no one-sided weakness, no true blackout
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get anxious about my health
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: refusing to walk for fear of falling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a recent test showed low B12 and large red cells

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: read online about spinal cord damage tonight; spouse present

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be told her spinal cord and brain are fine

objective_data_offered.value: the tingling is in BOTH hands equally and around my mouth; my face isn't drooping and my speech is normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self/spouse report; cannot perform a neurological examination remotely
